subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-10 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: Since the beginning of the world various philosophical thoughts and theories have been advanced. When we glance at history we find no end to these concepts.
subcodes.subjects: @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @rational arguments, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @limits of the intellect, @names and attributes of God
